title: 9 Stocks to Survive a “Dead Cat Bounce”
text: Investors usually aren't big fans of financial stocks, but if you know how to pick the right ones, it's possible to find safe opportunities. The post 9 Stocks to Survive a “Dead Cat Bounce” appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: W. R. Berkley (WRB) Forms New Unit for Clients in California
text: W. R. Berkley Corporation's (WRB) new unit Berkley Enterprise Risk Solutions is formed to provide workers' compensation insurance to large businesses in California.

title: W. R. Berkley Corporation Forms Berkley Enterprise Risk Solutions
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) today announced the formation of Berkley Enterprise Risk Solutions. The new business will focus on providing workers' compensation insurance to large businesses headquartered in California. Wayne Bryan has been named president of the new business, and Hale Johnston has been appointed chief operating officer. The appointments are effective immediately. W. Robert Berkley, Jr., president and chief executive officer of W. R. B

title: W. R. Berkley Corporation to Announce Second Quarter 2022 Earnings on July 21, 2022
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) will release its second quarter 2022 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, July 21, 2022. A copy of the earnings release will be available on the Company's website at www.berkley.com. The Company has scheduled its quarterly conference call with analysts and investors to discuss its earnings and other information on Thursday, July 21, 2022 at 5:00 p.m. eastern time. title: 5 Must-Buy Stocks to Gain From an Expected Bear Market Rally
text: We have selected five large-cap stocks that have provided double-digit returns year to date despite the market mayhem. These are: ADM, WRB, MPC, CLR and AZPN.

title: Here's Why Investors May Bet on W.R. Berkley (WRB) Stock
text: W.R. Berkley (WRB) is poised to benefit from high retention, growth in premium rates and benefits derived from market dislocations.

title: W. R. Berkley (WRB) Ups Dividend, OK's Special Dividend
text: W. R. Berkley's (WRB) dividend hike and special dividend approval reflects its operational excellence and concerted effort to enhance shareholders value.

title: Top 5 Insurance Stocks to Play a Higher Interest Rate Regime
text: We have narrowed our search to five U.S.-based insurers. These are: WRB, RLI, AFG, MET and CINF.

title: W. R. Berkley Corporation Increases Regular Quarterly Dividend and Declares Special Cash Dividend
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) announced today that its Board of Directors has voted to increase the regular cash dividend to an annual rate of 40 cents per share, representing a 15.3% increase from the present rate. The first regular quarterly cash dividend at the new rate of 10 cents per share will be paid on July 7, 2022 to stockholders of record at the close of business on June 27, 2022.
